tasks.label: Backend
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps -q -f name=backend)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f backend

tasks.label: Frontend
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps -q -f name=frontend)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f frontend

tasks.label: Database
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps -q -f name=debserver)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f dbserver

tasks.label: Totp_server
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps -q -f name=totp_server)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f totp_server

tasks.label: Grafana
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps -q -f name=grafana)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f grafana

tasks.label: Prometheus
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps -q -f name=prometheus)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f prometheus

tasks.label: Adminer
tasks.command: until [ "$(docker ps | grep adminer)" ]; do sleep 1; done && docker logs -f adminer

tasks.label: Bash
tasks.command: clear && echo 'Listo para trabajar en TRANSCENDENCE'
